SEARCH

All Packages

Package Summary
Package
Description
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit
App entry package containing the Hilt application class, main activity, and shared app helpers.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml
Machine-learning inference classes for TensorFlow Lite breed classification and prediction models.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.dao
Room DAO interfaces for persistence queries and updates across app data tables.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.entity
Room entity models and relation projections used by the local database schema.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service
Core service layer classes, including Room database setup and dependency-injection modules.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi
Dog API integration contracts and mappers for remote breed data retrieval.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi.dto
DTO types representing request/response payloads exchanged with The Dog API.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository
Repository abstractions and implementations that bridge UI/viewmodels to data sources.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.seed
Seed-data loaders and DTOs used to initialize local lookup tables from bundled assets.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.storage
App-private file storage helpers for persisted scan images and related media.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ui
Fragment and adapter classes that render app screens and handle user interactions.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel
ViewModel and projection classes that manage UI state and presentation-ready data.
